ksa_text: Knowledge of data and AI business case construction, including value driver identification, benefit quantification methods, investment sizing, and risk-adjusted return analysis.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Leadership & Strategy is a primary or secondary domain for the AI CoE Leader. This knowledge KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (c suite).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Leadership & Strategy), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.47). External reviewers may question whether this specific knowledge KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the AI CoE Leader versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: McKinsey, Gartner, and Harvard Business Review consistently identify leadership and strategy skills as core differentiators for C-suite and VP data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Leadership & Strategy appearing in job postings and role definition literature for AI CoE Leader.

decision_rationale: Leadership & Strategy knowledge KSA is within scope for the AI CoE Leader at the c suite tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
